Title: 🔴 VS Code Live - Modernizing Legacy .NET applications with GitHub Copilot Modernization in VS Code
Author: dotnet
Description:
Join Joel Norman and Jorge Balderas and watch them let Copilot loose to try modernizing a .NET application with GitHub Copilot Modernization in VS Code.

🔗 Links: https://dotnet.microsoft.com/platform/modernize https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/developer/github-copilot-app-modernization/ https://github.com/dotnet/modernize-dotnet

🎙️ Featuring: Olivia Guzzardo McVicker: https://x.com/OliviaGuzzardo Joel Norman: https://x.com/normandeveloper GitHub: microsoftnorman LinkedIn: joeltnorman/ Jorge Balderas: https://x.com/jorgerbf GitHub: yortch LinkedIn: joeltnorman/ LinkedIn: balderas
